overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban district during golden hour. The player traverses a green pedestrian walkway, explores a small shrine courtyard, crosses a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles, and continues along covered sidewalks in a densely built cyberpunk environment with neon signage and mixed industrial architecture.

approaching the entrance to a small shrine courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green pedestrian walkway, passing by a pedestrian in a yellow jacket

tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
multi-story teal and green buildings with balconies and neon signage

tall modern street lamps along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a distinctive green pedestrian walkway in a futuristic urban district during golden hour. Palm trees line the street to the left while teal commercial buildings with balconies rise on the right. A pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt passes by closely on the left as the player approaches the entrance to a small shrine courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: small urban shrine courtyard with sacred tree

events.description: navigating around the large tree and outdoor seating area

agents.ego_description: walking through the shrine courtyard, observing the sacred tree and people sitting at outdoor tables

notable_agents.action: group of people sitting at outdoor dining tables under umbrellas near the building

entered.detail: large mature tree with thick trunk and spreading branches in the courtyard center
traditional stone lantern structure near the gravel path
ground covered with gravel and scattered white stones
multi-story building with teal facade and balconies overlooking the courtyard
tables and chairs with umbrellas arranged outside the building
tall cylindrical residential tower with multiple windows and balconies

segments.scene_description: The player enters a tranquil shrine courtyard featuring a large sacred tree at its center and traditional stone lanterns. The ground is covered in gravel, and several people sit at outdoor dining tables on the right side. A tall apartment tower rises in the background while the teal commercial building now appears on the left as the player navigates around the tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk along industrial street with overhead highway

events.description: exiting shrine courtyard onto concrete sidewalk along the main street
waiting at the curb for vehicles to pass before crossing

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk past the Charter street sign, approaching the busy intersection

entered.detail: standard gray concrete sidewalk with tactile paving strips
green street sign with white text reading Charter mounted on a pole
large industrial structures with metal siding and exposed pipes
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines
elevated highway ramp with concrete supports crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the shrine, the player turns left onto a concrete sidewalk running alongside an industrial street. A green Charter street sign is visible on the left, while large industrial buildings and warehouses line the right side. Overhead highway ramps and electrical pylons dominate the skyline as the player approaches a busy intersection and waits at the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with futuristic traffic and neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: beginning to cross the street between moving futuristic vehicles
entering area with prominent red neon lighting and illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy intersection, carefully navigating between futuristic cars and trucks

notable_agents.action: large black futuristic SUV with red accent lighting driving through the intersection
dark sedan with bright headlights approaching the crosswalk

entered.detail: wide asphalt road with white lane markings and crosswalk lines
commercial building with bright green and red neon signage and large windows
large red support pillars with neon lighting at the building entrance
large satellite dish mounted on the roof of the industrial building
white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The player steps onto the asphalt intersection and begins crossing between dense futuristic traffic including a large black SUV and several sedans. The scene shifts to an area with prominent red neon-lit structural pillars and bright commercial signage. The industrial buildings now appear on the left as the player navigates across the crosswalk markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under industrial building overhang

events.description: approaching red traffic light and slowing down at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk toward the traffic light at the next intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

traffic signal showing red light mounted on a pole at the intersection
large concrete overhang from the industrial building creating a covered walkway
cars parked along the curb on the left side of the street
red illuminated vending machine with digital display on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a covered sidewalk beneath a large industrial building overhang, providing shelter from the open street. A digital vending machine glows red on the left while parked cars line the street. The player approaches a red traffic light at the next intersection, following a pedestrian in red clothing walking ahead in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic urban district that transitions from a serene, greenery-lined walkway into a dense, neon-lit industrial corridor during golden hour. It begins along a green pedestrian path flanked by palm trees and teal commercial buildings, moving past a pedestrian in yellow before entering a tranquil shrine courtyard centered around a large sacred tree and stone lanterns. As the camera exits the shrine, the environment shifts toward a gritty industrial street characterized by concrete sidewalks, overhead highway ramps, and electrical pylons. The scene then opens up as the player crosses a busy asphalt intersection amidst futuristic traffic and red neon-lit pillars, moving from the open road toward the shelter of a large building overhang. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian in red along a covered sidewalk past a glowing red vending machine, ending at a traffic light beneath the heavy architecture of the city.
